title: Dehumidifiers for Home, 2200ml Small Dehumidifiers for Bedroom with Auto Defrost Function, Timer Modes, Ultra Quiet, Auto Shut off & 7 Colorful LED Dehumidifier for Bathroom, Wardrobe, Closet, RV
features: 【High-Efficiency Dehumidification】: Our small dehumidifier uses semiconductor condensation technology to effectively collect excess moisture from the air. Under conditions of 86℉ and 80% RH, it can extract up to 450ml of water per day, 75 oz (2200 ml) transparent tank for easy monitoring. Smart dehumidifier helps keep your indoor air fresh and dry, preventing discomfort caused by mold and dampness.

【Quiet Bedroom Dehumidifier】The dehumidifiers for the bathroom supports two working modes. When in strong mode, the fan of the small dehumidifiers will be set to high level, which can quickly reduce the humidity. In sleep mode, it ensures quiet operation of the dehumidifier, with noise 28dB, allowing you to enjoy wonderful air while reading or sleeping without any disturbance.

【Automatic Shut-Off And Colourful Night Lights】It automatically shuts off when full, indicated by a flashing red light, so you don't have to worry about water overflowing, ensuring safety and conserving energy. Additionally, home dehumidifier is equipped with7 Colorful LED Lights, The lights can be rotated or fixed to a specific color according to your needs. It is not only a dehumidifier for bedroom, but also a nice decoration for your home. It is a good idea for high-humidity areas such as bathrooms, bedrooms, closets, small basements, kitchens, living rooms, and RVs.

【Intelligent Control Panel And Timer Function】The small dehumidifier is equipped with an LED display and touch control, and all settings are very simple and clear. Also equipped with a timer function that offers 4H/8H/12H/24H intervals.

【Auto-defrost】Unlike other dehumidifiers, our small dehumidifier has an automatic defrost function that ensures the machine operates in a healthy and good condition. When the temperature probe identifies that the machine condensing piece is frosted, the machine automatically turns on the defrost function; after the temperature rises, the defrost function turns off and the cooling piece starts working again to continue dehumidifying.

【PORTABLE & QUALITY ASSURANCE】Our small dehumidifier is designed for portability and efficiency, with dimensions of 6.7"D x 6.7"W x 10.9"H. Its ergonomic design includes a built-in handle, allowing for easy placement in any desired location. This unit is capable of covering up to 500 square feet. This makes it perfect for use in bedrooms, bathrooms, closets, kitchens, RVs, and garages. Each unit undergoes rigorous testing to ensure quality and durability. Should you have any questions about our dehumidifiers, please feel free to contact us.

【Possible Causes of No Water/Little Water in the Dehumidifier Water Tank】①Humidity ≤ 40%-50%, ②Temperature ≤ 5°C, ③Space > 600 Sq.Ft, ④Working time < 48 hours ⑤Use with open windows ⑥The rear air inlet is close to the wall.
